events.text: {"decision":"fail","risk":"critical","work_stage":"in-progress","component_conditions":["non-compliant","installed-defective"],"percent_complete":50,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.9,"event_time":0,"rate":0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Cords/cables across walkways creating trip hazards","Missing guardrails at elevated edges/open sides","Blocked egress paths preventing emergency exit","Blocked fire extinguishers not accessible","Improvised/non-compliant scaffold lacking proper components and fall protection","Unattended open holes without covers/guardrails"],"actions":["Remove or reroute cords; use cord covers or overhead routing, keep walkways clear","Install compliant guardrails or barricade and restrict access until complete","Clear egress paths immediately and keep exits unobstructed","Clear access to extinguishers; maintain minimum 36-inch clearance","Remove improvised scaffold; erect OSHA-compliant scaffold per 1926 Subpart L with competent person inspection","Cover open holes with secured covers capable of supporting loads or guard them; never leave unattended"],"rationale":"Multiple serious hazards present on an active production floor violate OSHA general duty and Subpart L scaffold requirements; conditions pose imminent risk of trips, falls, and blocked emergency response, requiring immediate stop-work controls.","references":["OSHA General Duty Clause","29 CFR 1926 Subpart L (Scaffolds)"]}
